def: (i.e. jāti+andha). For this and other compounds see s.v. jāt, 'birth,' &c.

ety: for A. جودة, inf. n. of جود 'to be good,' &c.

Bright, shining, glittering

s.m. An indivisible atom; (met.) an unrivalled or unequalled person

def: s.m. Land cultivated alternately by rabīʻ and ḵẖarīf sowings, land in continual cultivation; land which has yielded a spring crop of wheat and barley, and is sown for another crop of different grain.

def: s.m. The sign Gemini; — Orion.

def: s.m. Answer, reply, response (to a letter, writing, saying, or question); retort, rejoinder; anything answering to another, counterpart, facsimile, double, pair; return, reward, compensation; discharge, dismissal, congé; refusal (of an offer of marriage, &c.)

'May your advice prevail,' a kind of benediction

s.m. Wandering up and down, wandering about; moving or springing from side to side (as combatants or competitors in an amphitheatre or place of exercise); moving round (as a horse in a manege), coursing; — jaulān, jūlān, s.m. Fetters, irons

def: s.m.f. Winning, being victorious; conquest, victory, triumph; advancement, preferment, promotion; resignation; — (as an intj.) bravo! hurrah! all hail!; — s.m. A yellow species of the Phaseolus mungo; — name of one of the two gate-keepers of the Hindū paradise

def: s.f. A cord, string; a worm; a snake; a measuring rope or chain; measurement by rope or chain.
adj. Conquerable, vincible, to be conquered or overcome; needing, liable, or fit to be conquered.
s.m. The letter or the sound jha.

ety: S. धात्रं, and धात्र+कं; or दर्वः, cf. ḍabba and ḍab
def: s.m. A leathern vessel for measuring out or holding oil, ghee, &c.; a ladle; a narrow-mouthed milk-pail (syn. jhāwlī).

ety: S. धात्रं, and धात्र+कं; or दर्वः, cf. ḍabba and ḍab
def: s.m. A leathern vessel for measuring out or holding oil, ghee, &c.; a ladle; a narrow-mouthed milk-pail (syn. jhāwlī).

ety: jhāb, q.v.+ar = Prk. अडी = S. अ+र+ई
def: s.f. Low-land on which water lies; a pool: marshy land, a marsh, fen, swamp.
s.m. A tuft; a tassel; a pendant; — adj. = jhabbe-dār, Tufted; having a tassel; (in Bot.) fasciculate.
s.f. An ornament with a tuft or tassel, trappings.
adj. (f. -ī) & s.m. = jhabbā, q.v.; — long-haired, &c. = jhabrā, q.v.; — bent, curved, bending (as the bough of a tree).
s.m. A kind of ornament (cf. jhabbī; jhabkā).
s.m. = jhabbā; jhumkā, qq.v.
subs: s.m. An ear-ring having a cluster of pearls (or other jewels) as a pendant.

def: v.t. To dazzle; to astonish.

ety: jhāb, q.v. + rā = Prk. अडओ = S. अ+र+कः; jhāblī = jhābrī
def: = jhāb, q.v.
adj. (f. -ī), Having long hair (an animal), hairy, shaggy.

ety: jhāb, q.v. + rā = Prk. अडओ = S. अ+र+कः; jhāblī = jhābrī
def: = jhāb, q.v.
s.m. A bush, &c. = jhāṛ, q.v.; (loc.) a tree.
s.m. = jhābar q.v.
s.m. (dialec.) = jhādā; jhābar, q.v.
s.m. = jhābar q.v.
s.m. Foam, froth; scum
subs: v.n. To foam, to froth; to foam with rage.

def: s.m. = jhaṅgā, q.v.; cf. also jhagulā.
v.n. To foam, to froth.
s.m. A species of hawk or falcon.
v.n. To wrangle, dispute, contend, quarrel, squabble; to argue; to cavil.
adj. & s.m. (dialec.) = jhagṛālū, q.v.
s.m. Wrangling, quarrelling; contention, strife, dispute, quarrel, squabble, brawl
subs: To raise a quarrel, to set a-wrangling, &c. = jhagṛā karānā
(-kā), To engage or interfere in a quarrel (of others)
s.m. Wrangling and squabbling, squabble, brawl ( = jhagṛā)
(-meṅ), To cause a quarrel (between), to set a-wrangling, to set by the ears

def: s.f. A quarrelsome or contentious woman.
adj. & s.m. Quarrelsome, wrangling, disputatious, contentious, litigious; — a disputer, an arguer; a contentious or quarrelsome person, a brawler.
v.t. To cause to quarrel, to set a-wrangling, to set by the ears, to get up a fight (between = jhagṛā karānā).
adj. Quarrelsome, &c. = jhagṛālū, q.v.
s.m. (dialec.) = jhagṛā, q.v.

ety: jhaga = jhaṅgā, q.v.+Prk. उल्लओ and उल्लिआ = S. उल +कः and इका
def: A child's frock or coat (reaching to the feet); a child's angarkhā.

ety: jhaga = jhaṅgā, q.v.+Prk. उल्लओ and उल्लिआ = S. उल +कः and इका
def: A child's frock or coat (reaching to the feet); a child's angarkhā.
v.n. To blink with pain (through strong light), to be dazzled.
s.f. Shadow; reflection; a dusky oolour; a dark spot in a looking-glass (where the quick-silver has worn away); a freckle, a black spot on the face (not a mole)
subs: s.f. A children's game (in which they go round in a circle and make a noise like the cawing of crows).

def: v.n. = jhaṅwānā, q.v.
s.m. A long beard.
s.m. An intoxicating mixture made of bhaṅg or hemp ( = gāṅjā).

ety: S. जज्वल+कः; by redupl. fr. rt. ज्वल
def: s.m. Break of day, early dawn.

ety: S. झर्झरं; or jhāṅjh, q.v.+ar = Prk. अडो = S. अ+रः
def: s.m. Cymbals ( = jhāṅjh); an ornament with little bells worn on the ankle.
s.m. = jhajhalkā, q.v.
v.t. To cause to start, to startle; to speak snappishly to, to browbeat.
s.m. lit. 'Having openings or interstices'; a kind of sweetmeat.
adj. Perforated, full of holes, riddled; porous; reticulated; grated; latticed, trellised; — s.f. (S. jarjarīkā), A porous goglet; a grating; a lattice, a screen ( = jhanjhrī).
s.m. = jhajjhar, q.v.
s.f. A violent gust with rain, a squall, &c.; see jhanjhā.
A large porous water-jar; a porous goglet ( = jhanjhar).
s.f. = jhajhrī, q.v.
adj. Bright, shining; clear, clean, white
subs: adj. Bright, shining, glittering (with gold and silver, &c., as brocade)
v.t. To brighten, to polish, to make clean, to clean out (a platter).

def: s.f. Babble, incoherent speech, foolish talking or acting, nonsense; muttering, murmuring; tall talk, boasting; raving, delirium; passion, emotion; wrangling, contending, contention
subs: s.m., jhak-jhorī, s.f. Wrangling, contention, mutual pulling and tugging (either in play or in earnest); scramble; altercation; sky-larking; mutual dalliance
adj. Troubled, disturbed, turbid (as water); — s.m. = jhak-jhorī, q.v.
v.n. To talk incoherently, to babble or prate (as an insane person, or a drunken man), to rave; to talk or act foolishly; to talk largely, to boast; to pull a long bow
s.f. The being affected with jhak, the talking or acting foolishly, &c.

def: v.t. = jhaṅkānā, q.v.
s.f. = jhakrī, q.v
s.f. = jhakrī, q.v

ety: jhakā, fr. jhak, q.v.+Prk. वंतो = S. वत्
def: adj. Wrathful, passionate, furious.
s.f. Chattering, talking nonsense; raving; lamenting, bewailing.
v.n. To chatter, &c. = jhaknā, q.v.
adj. Wrathful, passionate, violent.
s.m. A chatterer, prater, mutterer, one who talks to himself, &c. (see jhak; and bakwāsī).
v.n. To talk incoherently, to prate nonsense, &c. = jhak mārnā, and jhaknā, q.v.
s.m. A sudden blast, a squall, gale, storm, tempest, hurricane; — adj. Stubborn, perverse, mulish
s.m. A chatterer, prater, mutterer, one who talks to himself, &c. (see jhak; and bakwāsī).

ety: jhak˚ = Prk. झंख(इ) = S. ध्वांक्ष(ति), rt. ध्वांक्ष्
def: v.n. To babble, chatter, prate, talk nonsense, to rave; to lament; to rail (see jhak mārnā).
v.t. (dialec.) = ḍhāṅknā, q.v.

r: jhakol, jhakolā, jhakor, jhakorā, jhakolā denā, ko, jhakolnā
def: s.f. = H جهکولا झकोला jhakolā, s.m. A shaking, agitation; a shock, &c. = jhakor and jhakorā; splashing, a splash or dip (in water); a large wave ( = jhakorā)

r: jhakolā, jhakol, jhakor, jhakorā, jhakolā denā, ko, jhakolnā
def: s.m. = H جهکول झकोल jhakol, s.f. A shaking, agitation; a shock, &c. = jhakor and jhakorā; splashing, a splash or dip (in water); a large wave ( = jhakorā)
v.t. To shake, put in motion, &c. ( = jhakornā); to dash or knock about (in water); to splash.
s.f. A shaking (as by sickness, &c.); a shock; loss, misfortune (see jhakorā)
subs: (-se), To be shaken (by); to receive a shock; to meet with loss.

def: s.m. Waving, shaking, agitation (of a tree, &c., by the wind): gust, blast (of wind), current (of air); a squall, a heavy shower, driving rain; a large wave; a shove, push, impulse, drive.
v.t. To shake, to put in motion; to drive or beat (as wind or rain); cf. jhakolnā.
v.t. (Braj) = jhakornā, q.v.
s.m. A large earthen vessel.

ety: jhak, q.v.+ṛā = Prk. इओ = S. र+कः
def: s.m. Foolish prattle, nonsense; a rigmarole, a silly story.
s.f. = jhakrī, q.v.
s.f. An earthen vessel (for holding milk, &c.); a milkpail.
adj. & s.m. Sharp, hot, pungent; — sharpness, heat, hot taste, pungency (as of pepper or chillies), acrimony; joining or solder (of metals); — a large basket ( = jhallā).
s.f. Warmth, heat (from a fire); radiance; glare; — strong emotion; ardency; passion, anger; jealousy
subs: or jhal miṭānā, To cool (one's) ardour or passion, &c.; to satisfy a longing
s.m. Radiance, glare, glitter, brilliance, splendour
adj. & s.f. Radiant, brilliant, shining, splendid, covered with jewels and ornaments; — radiance, &c. = jhal-jhal.

def: s.m. Local rain, rain which falls on one spot and not on another close to it.
adj. & s.f. See s.v. jhal.
adj. Hot, burning, &c. ( = jhallā, q.v.); — distrustful, suspicious, jealous ( = jhalhāyā, q.v.).
adj. & s.f. See s.v. jhal.
s.f. Brightness, radiance, glare, glitter, sparkle, lustre, splendour, refulgence, reflection (of light).

ety: jhalak˚ = Prk. झल्लक्क(इ), or झल्लक्के(इ); fr. S. झल (for ज्वल)+कृ
def: v n. To shine, glare, glitter, glisten, sparkle, flash.
v.n. To spurt, to spurt out, &c. = ćhalaknā.
v.t. To mend, repair (by soldering), to solder, cement.
s.f. A fringe
s.m. A brake, thicket, copse, underwood, brushwood.
adj. & s.m. (f. -ī), Burnt; hot, burning (with), consumed (by passion, lust, or jealousy, &c.); lustful; jealous, suspicious; — a lustful man; a jealous man.
adj. & s.m. (f. -ī) = jhalhāyā, q.v.
s.m. Radiance, glare, glitter, brilliance, splendour.
adj. (f. -ī), Bright, glittering, radiant, brilliant, splendid.
Glittering, sparkling; glitter, &c. = jhal-jhal, q.v.; — burn, smart.

ety: jhaljhalā+ā˚ = āw = Prk. आवे = S. आपि caus. augment
def: v.n. To shine, glare, glitter, sparkle; to burn, smart, tingle; to throb, beat; to become angry, be enraged, to fly into a passion.
s.f. = jhaljhalāhaṭ, q.v.
s.m. A blister (cf. ćhilkā).
v.t. To cause to shine or sparkle, &c.; to brighten, polish, burnish; to flash.
s.m. Light, brightness, &c. = jhalak, q.v.
s.f. A flash; a glance.
s.m. = jallā, q.v.; — a shower
adj. (f. -ī), Hot, pungent ( = jhāl); fiery, passionate, hot-tempered; lustful, libidinous.
s.m. A large basket.
v.n. To burn, to smart, to tingle; to become angry or enraged, to fly into a passion.
s.m. (prov.), A water-wheel, a Persian wheel (syn. rahaṭ).
s.f. A large basket.
adj. = jhallā, q.v.

ety: jhāl˚ = Prk. झाल(इ), or झाले(इ) = S. ज्वालय(ति), caus. of rt. ज्वल्
def: v.t. To clean, to polish (plate, &c.).

ety: jhal˚ = S. व्हल(ति), rt. व्हल; cf. jhāṅtnā
def: v.t. To move (a fan, &c.) to and fro, to fan, to flap, to swing or wave.
v.t. To make hot or pungent, to season (pickles, &c.); — to solder
v.n. To be repaired or soldered, be cemented.
s.f. (dialec.) = ćhalnī, q.v.
s.m. = jhulār, q.v.
s.m. A spring (of water), a well; a square bāʼolī or well of solid masonry.
s.m. (dialec.) A necklace.
s.f. A cymbal ( = jhājhar; jhāṅjh).
s.f. The price paid for soldering.
v.t. To cause to be moved to and fro (a fan); to have (one) fanned; to cause to be flapped.
s.m. A large instrument in the shape of a hoe used for excavating earth in well-sinking, &c.
s.m. Pumice stone; vitrified brick (com. used to clean the hands and feet with; also written jhāṅwāṅ).
s.m. & adv. = jham-jham, q.v.
s.m. = jhāmā, q.v.
s.m. The sight, or the appearance, of a beautiful woman.
s.m. Beating rain, a heavy shower; crash (as of breaking glass, &c.); — quickness, celerity, haste, dash, &c. ( = jhapākā, q.v.).
s.m. Concourse, crowd (especially of low people), mob.
v.n. To shine, to glitter, glisten, flash; to dance (cf. jhalaknā; ćamaknā).

ety: jhamak, q.v.+ṛā = Prk. अडओ = S. अ+र+कः
def: s.m. = jhamak; jhalak.
s.m. A small whetstone (such as is used by housewives for sharpening their spindles, needles, &c.).
s.f. Marshy land, swamp ( = jhāwar, jhābar)
s.m. & adv. = jham-jham, q.v.

ety: S. झं+मेला and मेल+कः; or el (pleon.) = अडो (with euph. y inserted) = S. अ+र+कः
def: Wrangling, altercation, row, pother; entanglement, complication, difficulty, dilemma, imbroglio, mess, &c. (syn. bakheṛā).

ety: S. झं+मेला and मेल+कः; or el (pleon.) = अडो (with euph. y inserted) = S. अ+र+कः
def: Wrangling, altercation, row, pother; entanglement, complication, difficulty, dilemma, imbroglio, mess, &c. (syn. bakheṛā).

ety: jhamel, q.v.+iyā = Prk. इओ = S. इकः(इन्+कः)
def: s.m. A wrangler, a quarrelsome fellow, a brawler; a mischief-maker, troublesome fellow, pest, &c. ( = bakheṛiyā).
s.m. & adv. The sound of heavy rain; dashing, beating (of rain), steady downpour; — heavily and continuously (raining).
s.f. Glitter, sparkle, &c. = jhalak, q.v.
v.n. To shine, sparkle, flash, glitter, dance (as light).
adj. (f. -ī), Shining, glittering, brilliant, resplendent.
